name: Nachos
recipeIngredient: 1 can Campbell's NEW Cheddar Cheese Soup
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 10 minutes. Cook time: 5 minutes.
1. In a 1 1/2 quart saucepan, combine the soup and salsa. Heat over low heat, stirring frequently until heated through.
2. Serve the mixture over the tortilla chips. Top with tomato slices, green onions, olives, and peppers.
